html:
Fact Symbols with Injective Instances


None


Multiset Rewriting Rules


rule (modulo AC) isend:
   [ !KU( x ) ] --[ K( x ) ]-> [ In( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo AC) irecv:
   [ Out( x ) ] --> [ !KD( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo E) Terminal_Issuer_Network:
   [ Send( S, R, channelID, msg ) ]
  -->
   [ Recv( S, R, channelID, msg ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Generate_Amount_Low:
   [ ]
  --[ Once( <$amount, 'Amount'> ) ]->
   [ !Value( $amount, 'Low' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Generate_Amount_High:
   [ ]
  --[ Once( <$amount, 'Amount'> ) ]->
   [ !Value( $amount, 'High' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Generate_ATC:
   [ Fr( ~ATC ) ] --> [ !ATC( ~ATC ), Out( ~ATC ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Create_CA:
   [ Fr( ~privkCA ) ]
  --[ Wellformedness( ), Once( $CA ), Role( $CA, 'CA' )
  ]->
   [
   !LtkCA( $CA, ~privkCA ),
   !CertCA( $CA,
            <<'01', $CA, pk(~privkCA), $CA>,
             sign(<'01', $CA, pk(~privkCA), $CA>, ~privkCA)>
   ),
   Out( pk(~privkCA) )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Create_Issuer:
   [ Fr( ~privkIssuer ), !LtkCA( $CA, ~privkCA ) ]
  --[ Once( $Issuer ), Role( $Issuer, 'Issuer' ) ]->
   [
   !LtkIssuer( $Issuer, ~privkIssuer ),
   !CertIssuer( $Issuer,
                <<'02', $Issuer, pk(~privkIssuer), $CA>,
                 sign(<'02', $Issuer, pk(~privkIssuer), $CA>,
                      ~privkCA)
                >
   ),
   !IssuingCA( $Issuer, $CA ), Out( pk(~privkIssuer) )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Compromise_CA:
   [ !LtkCA( $CA, ~privkCA ) ]
  --[ Compromise( $CA ) ]->
   [ Out( ~privkCA ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Compromise_Issuer:
   [ !LtkIssuer( $Issuer, ~privkIssuer ) ]
  --[ Compromise( $Issuer ) ]->
   [ Out( <$Issuer, ~privkIssuer> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Compromise_Issuer_Card_ShK:
   [ !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer ), !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK ) ]
  --[ Compromise( $Issuer ), Compromise( ~PAN ) ]->
   [ Out( ~MK ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Compromise_Card_ECC:
   [ !ECCPrivKeyCard( ~PAN, ~dC ) ]
  --[ Compromise( ~PAN ) ]->
   [ Out( <~PAN, ~dC> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Compromise_Terminal_ECC:
   [ Terminal_May_Compromise( $Terminal, ~dT ) ]
  --[ Compromise( $Terminal ) ]->
   [ Out( ~dT ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Set_PIN:
   [ Fr( ~PIN ), Set_PIN( ~PAN, CVM, $CA, $Issuer ) ]
  --[
  NEq( CVM, 'NoCVM' ), SecretPIN( ~PIN ), Honest( $CA ),
  Honest( $Issuer ), Honest( ~PAN )
  ]->
   [
   !PIN( ~PAN, ~PIN ), !Entered_PIN( ~PAN, ~PIN ),
   !Entered_PIN( ~PAN, 'WrongPIN' )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Create_Card_C8:
   [
   Fr( ~PAN ), Fr( ~expDate ), Fr( ~MK ),
   !LtkIssuer( $Issuer, ~privkIssuer ),
   !CertIssuer( $Issuer, certIssuer ), !IssuingCA( $Issuer, $CA ),
   In( <Data1, Data2> )
   ]
  --[
  Role( ~PAN, 'Card' ), SecretPAN( ~PAN ), SecretMK( ~MK ),
  Honest( $CA ), Honest( $Issuer ), Honest( ~PAN )
  ]->
   [
   !AIP( ~PAN, <Data1, Data2> ), !AID( ~PAN, 'C8' ),
   !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK ), !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer ),
   Set_Records_C8( ~PAN, ~expDate, $CA, certIssuer ),
   Set_PIN( ~PAN, 'OnlinePIN', $CA, $Issuer )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Set_Records_C8:
   [
   Set_Records_C8( ~PAN, ~expDate, $CA, certIssuer ),
   !AIP( ~PAN, AIP ), !AID( ~PAN, 'C8' ),
   !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer ),
   !LtkIssuer( $Issuer, ~privkIssuer ), Fr( ~dC )
   ]
  --[
  SecretECCPrivkCard( ~dC ), Honest( $CA ), Honest( $Issuer ),
  Honest( ~PAN )
  ]->
   [
   Out( g^~dC ), !ECCPrivKeyCard( ~PAN, ~dC ),
   !Protected_Records( ~PAN,
                       <~PAN, ~expDate,
                        <'14', h(<~PAN, ~expDate, AIP>), g^~dC>,
                        sign(<'14', h(<~PAN, ~expDate, AIP>), g^~dC>,
                             ~privkIssuer)
                       >
   ),
   !Unprotected_Records( ~PAN, <$CA, certIssuer> ),
   !SDA_Hash( ~PAN, h(<~PAN, ~expDate, AIP>) )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Terminal_Sends_GPO_C8:
   [ Fr( ~dT ) ]
  --[ OneTerminal( ), Role( $Terminal, 'Terminal' ) ]->
   [
   Out( <'GET_PROCESSING_OPTIONS', g^~dT> ),
   Terminal_Sent_GPO_C8( $Terminal, ~dT ),
   Terminal_May_Compromise( $Terminal, ~dT )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Card_Responds_To_GPO_C8:
   [
   In( <'GET_PROCESSING_OPTIONS', QT> ),
   !AIP( ~PAN, AIP ), !AID( ~PAN, 'C8' ), !ATC( ATC ),
   Fr( ~r ), !ECCPrivKeyCard( ~PAN, dC )
   ]
  --[ OneCard( ), Once( <~PAN, ATC, 'Card'> ) ]->
   [
   Out( <AIP, 'AFL', g^~r^dC,
         senc(<'CMC', ~r>, KDF_SKc(QT^~r^dC))>
   ),
   Card_Responded_To_GPO_C8( ~PAN, ATC, KDF_SKc(QT^~r^dC),
                             KDF_SKi(QT^~r^dC)
   )
   ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) Card_Responds_To_GPO_C8:
     [
     In( <'GET_PROCESSING_OPTIONS', QT> ),
     !AIP( ~PAN, AIP ), !AID( ~PAN, 'C8' ), !ATC( ATC ),
     Fr( ~r ), !ECCPrivKeyCard( ~PAN, dC )
     ]
    --[ OneCard( ), Once( <~PAN, ATC, 'Card'> ) ]->
     [
     Out( <AIP, 'AFL', g^x,
           senc(<'CMC', ~r>, KDF_SKc(z))>
     ),
     Card_Responded_To_GPO_C8( ~PAN, ATC, KDF_SKc(z), KDF_SKi(z) )
     ]
    variants (modulo AC)
     1. ~r = ~r.17
        QT = DH_neutral
        dC = one
        x = ~r.17
        z = DH_neutral
    
     2. ~r = ~r.20
        QT = QT.23
        dC = one
        x = ~r.20
        z = QT.23^~r.20
    
     3. ~r = ~r.21
        QT = QT.24
        dC = dC.25
        x = (~r.21*dC.25)
        z = QT.24^(~r.21*dC.25)
    
     4. ~r = ~r.21
        QT = DH_neutral
        dC = dC.25
        x = (~r.21*dC.25)
        z = DH_neutral
    
     5. ~r = ~r.101
        QT = x.199^inv(dC.105)
        dC = dC.105
        x = (~r.101*dC.105)
        z = x.199^~r.101
    
     6. ~r = ~r.102
        QT = x.200^x.201
        dC = dC.106
        x = (~r.102*dC.106)
        z = x.200^(~r.102*dC.106*x.201)
    
     7. ~r = ~r.102
        QT = x.200^x.201
        dC = inv(x.201)
        x = (~r.102*inv(x.201))
        z = x.200^~r.102
    
     8. ~r = ~r.102
        QT = x.200^x.201
        dC = one
        x = ~r.102
        z = x.200^(~r.102*x.201)
    
     9. ~r = ~r.102
        QT = x.200^inv((dC.106*x.201))
        dC = dC.106
        x = (~r.102*dC.106)
        z = x.200^(~r.102*inv(x.201))
    
    10. ~r = ~r.102
        QT = x.200^(x.201*inv(dC.106))
        dC = dC.106
        x = (~r.102*dC.106)
        z = x.200^(~r.102*x.201)
    
    11. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^x.202
        dC = inv((x.202*x.203))
        x = (~r.103*inv((x.202*x.203)))
        z = x.201^(~r.103*inv(x.203))
    
    12. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^x.202
        dC = (x.203*inv(x.202))
        x = (~r.103*x.203*inv(x.202))
        z = x.201^(~r.103*x.203)
    
    13. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^inv(x.202)
        dC = inv(x.203)
        x = (~r.103*inv(x.203))
        z = x.201^(~r.103*inv((x.202*x.203)))
    
    14. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^inv(x.202)
        dC = (x.202*x.203)
        x = (~r.103*x.202*x.203)
        z = x.201^(~r.103*x.203)
    
    15. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^(x.202*x.203)
        dC = inv(x.202)
        x = (~r.103*inv(x.202))
        z = x.201^(~r.103*x.203)
    
    16. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^(x.202*inv(x.203))
        dC = (x.203*inv(x.202))
        x = (~r.103*x.203*inv(x.202))
        z = x.201^~r.103
    
    17. ~r = ~r.103
        QT = x.201^(x.202*inv((dC.107*x.203)))
        dC = dC.107
        x = (~r.103*dC.107)
        z = x.201^(~r.103*x.202*inv(x.203))
    
    18. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^x.203
        dC = (x.204*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        x = (~r.104*x.204*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.204*inv(x.205))
    
    19. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^inv(x.203)
        dC = (x.204*inv(x.205))
        x = (~r.104*x.204*inv(x.205))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.204*inv((x.203*x.205)))
    
    20. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^inv((x.203*x.204))
        dC = (x.203*x.205)
        x = (~r.104*x.203*x.205)
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.205*inv(x.204))
    
    21. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^inv((x.203*x.204))
        dC = (x.203*inv(x.205))
        x = (~r.104*x.203*inv(x.205))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*inv((x.204*x.205)))
    
    22. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*x.204)
        dC = inv((x.203*x.205))
        x = (~r.104*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.204*inv(x.205))
    
    23. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*x.204)
        dC = (x.205*inv(x.203))
        x = (~r.104*x.205*inv(x.203))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.204*x.205)
    
    24. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*x.204*inv(x.205))
        dC = (x.205*inv(x.203))
        x = (~r.104*x.205*inv(x.203))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.204)
    
    25. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv(x.204))
        dC = inv(x.205)
        x = (~r.104*inv(x.205))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.203*inv((x.204*x.205)))
    
    26. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv(x.204))
        dC = inv((x.203*x.205))
        x = (~r.104*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*inv((x.204*x.205)))
    
    27. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv(x.204))
        dC = (x.204*x.205)
        x = (~r.104*x.204*x.205)
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.203*x.205)
    
    28. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv(x.204))
        dC = (x.204*x.205*inv(x.203))
        x = (~r.104*x.204*x.205*inv(x.203))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*x.205)
    
    29. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv(x.204))
        dC = (x.204*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        x = (~r.104*x.204*inv((x.203*x.205)))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*inv(x.205))
    
    30. ~r = ~r.104
        QT = x.202^(x.203*inv((x.204*x.205)))
        dC = (x.205*inv(x.203))
        x = (~r.104*x.205*inv(x.203))
        z = x.202^(~r.104*inv(x.204))
    
    31. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^inv((x.204*x.205))
        dC = (x.204*x.206*inv(x.207))
        x = (~r.105*x.204*x.206*inv(x.207))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.206*inv((x.205*x.207)))
    
    32. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*x.205)
        dC = (x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        x = (~r.105*x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.205*x.206*inv(x.207))
    
    33. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*x.205*inv(x.206))
        dC = inv((x.204*x.207))
        x = (~r.105*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.205*inv((x.206*x.207)))
    
    34. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*x.205*inv(x.206))
        dC = (x.206*x.207*inv(x.204))
        x = (~r.105*x.206*x.207*inv(x.204))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.205*x.207)
    
    35. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*x.205*inv(x.206))
        dC = (x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        x = (~r.105*x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.205*inv(x.207))
    
    36. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*x.205*inv((x.206*x.207)))
        dC = (x.207*inv(x.204))
        x = (~r.105*x.207*inv(x.204))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.205*inv(x.206))
    
    37. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv(x.205))
        dC = (x.205*x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        x = (~r.105*x.205*x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.206*inv(x.207))
    
    38. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv(x.205))
        dC = (x.206*inv(x.207))
        x = (~r.105*x.206*inv(x.207))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.204*x.206*inv((x.205*x.207)))
    
    39. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv(x.205))
        dC = (x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        x = (~r.105*x.206*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.206*inv((x.205*x.207)))
    
    40. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv((x.205*x.206)))
        dC = (x.205*x.207)
        x = (~r.105*x.205*x.207)
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.204*x.207*inv(x.206))
    
    41. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv((x.205*x.206)))
        dC = (x.205*x.207*inv(x.204))
        x = (~r.105*x.205*x.207*inv(x.204))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.207*inv(x.206))
    
    42. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv((x.205*x.206)))
        dC = (x.205*inv(x.207))
        x = (~r.105*x.205*inv(x.207))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*x.204*inv((x.206*x.207)))
    
    43. ~r = ~r.105
        QT = x.203^(x.204*inv((x.205*x.206)))
        dC = (x.205*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        x = (~r.105*x.205*inv((x.204*x.207)))
        z = x.203^(~r.105*inv((x.206*x.207)))
    
    44. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*x.206*inv(x.207))
        dC = (x.207*x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        x = (~r.106*x.207*x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.206*x.208*inv(x.209))
    
    45. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*x.206*inv(x.207))
        dC = (x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        x = (~r.106*x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.206*x.208*inv((x.207*x.209)))
    
    46. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*x.206*inv((x.207*x.208)))
        dC = (x.207*x.209*inv(x.205))
        x = (~r.106*x.207*x.209*inv(x.205))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.206*x.209*inv(x.208))
    
    47. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*x.206*inv((x.207*x.208)))
        dC = (x.207*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        x = (~r.106*x.207*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.206*inv((x.208*x.209)))
    
    48. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*inv((x.206*x.207)))
        dC = (x.206*x.208*inv(x.209))
        x = (~r.106*x.206*x.208*inv(x.209))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.205*x.208*inv((x.207*x.209)))
    
    49. ~r = ~r.106
        QT = x.204^(x.205*inv((x.206*x.207)))
        dC = (x.206*x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        x = (~r.106*x.206*x.208*inv((x.205*x.209)))
        z = x.204^(~r.106*x.208*inv((x.207*x.209)))
    
    50. ~r = ~r.107
        QT = x.205^(x.206*x.207*inv((x.208*x.209)))
        dC = (x.208*x.210*inv((x.206*x.211)))
        x = (~r.107*x.208*x.210*inv((x.206*x.211)))
        z = x.205^(~r.107*x.207*x.210*inv((x.209*x.211)))
  */
rule (modulo E) Terminal_Receives_GPO_Respondse_C8:
   [
   In( <AIP, 'AFL', blindedQC,
        senc(<'CMC', r>, KDF_SKc(blindedQC^dT))>
   ),
   Terminal_Sent_GPO_C8( $Terminal, dT )
   ]
  -->
   [
   Terminal_Received_GPO_Resonondse_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT,
                                        r, KDF_SKc(blindedQC^dT), KDF_SKi(blindedQC^dT)
   )
   ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) Terminal_Receives_GPO_Respondse_C8:
     [
     In( <AIP, 'AFL', blindedQC,
          senc(<'CMC', r>, KDF_SKc(z))>
     ),
     Terminal_Sent_GPO_C8( $Terminal, dT )
     ]
    -->
     [
     Terminal_Received_GPO_Resonondse_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT,
                                          r, KDF_SKc(z), KDF_SKi(z)
     )
     ]
    variants (modulo AC)
     1. blindedQC
              = blindedQC.10

rule (modulo E) Terminal_Sends_RRP_C8:
   [
   Terminal_Received_GPO_Resonondse_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT,
                                        r, SKc, SKi
   ),
   Fr( ~UN )
   ]
  --[ FastPhaseStarts( ~UN ) ]->
   [
   Out( <'EXCHANGE_RELAY_RESISTANCE_DATA', ~UN> ),
   Terminal_Sent_ERRD_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT, r, SKc, SKi,
                          ~UN
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Card_Responds_To_RRP_C8:
   [
   Card_Responded_To_GPO_C8( ~PAN, ATC, SKc, SKi ),
   In( <'EXCHANGE_RELAY_RESISTANCE_DATA', TRRE> ),
   Fr( ~DRRE )
   ]
  --[ FastPhaseAction( ~PAN ) ]->
   [
   Card_Responded_To_ERRD_C8( ~PAN, ATC, SKc, SKi, TRRE, ~DRRE ),
   Out( <~DRRE, 'Timing_Data'> )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Terminal_Sends_ReadRecord_C8:
   [
   Terminal_Sent_ERRD_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT, r, SKc, SKi,
                          UN
   ),
   In( <DRRE, 'Timing_Data'> )
   ]
  --[ FastPhaseEnds( DRRE ) ]->
   [
   Out( <'READ_RECORD', 'AFL'> ),
   Terminal_Sent_ReadRecord_C8( $Terminal, AIP, blindedQC, dT, r, SKc,
                                SKi, UN, DRRE
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Card_Responds_To_ReadRecord_C8:
   [
   Card_Responded_To_ERRD_C8( ~PAN, ATC, SKc, SKi, TRRE, DRRE ),
   !AIP( ~PAN, AIP ), !Protected_Records( ~PAN, protectedRecords ),
   !Unprotected_Records( ~PAN, unprotectedRecords ),
   In( <'READ_RECORD', 'AFL'> )
   ]
  -->
   [
   Out( <senc(protectedRecords, SKc), unprotectedRecords> ),
   Card_Ready_For_Cryptogram_C8( ~PAN, ATC, SKc, SKi, TRRE, DRRE )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Terminal_Receives_Records_LocalAuth_C8:
   [
   Terminal_Sent_ReadRecord_C8( $Terminal,
                                <'LocalAuth', AIP_Data2>, QC^r, dT, r, SKc, SKi, UN,
                                DRRE
   ),
   In( <
        senc(<~PAN, expDate,
              <'14',
               h(<~PAN, expDate, 'LocalAuth', AIP_Data2>), QC>,
              sign4>,
             SKc),
        $CA, <'02', $Issuer, pubkIssuer, $CA>, sign2>
   ),
   !IssuingCA( $Issuer, $CA ),
   !CertCA( $CA, <<'01', $CA, pubkCA, $CA>, sign1>
   )
   ]
  --[
  Eq( verify(sign1, <'01', $CA, pubkCA, $CA>, pubkCA),
      true
  ),
  Eq( verify(sign2, <'02', $Issuer, pubkIssuer, $CA>,
             pubkCA),
      true
  ),
  Eq( verify(sign4,
             <'14',
              h(<~PAN, expDate, 'LocalAuth', AIP_Data2>), QC>,
             pubkIssuer),
      true
  )
  ]->
   [
   Terminal_Ready_For_Cryptogram_C8( $Terminal, ~PAN, $Issuer, $CA,
                                     <'LocalAuth', AIP_Data2>, pubkIssuer, UN, SKc,
                                     SKi, expDate, DRRE
   )
   ]

   [
   Terminal_Sent_ReadRecord_C8( $Terminal,
                                <'NoLocalAuth', AIP_Data2>, blindedQC, dT, r, SKc,
                                SKi, UN, DRRE

                                            ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, 'C8'>,
                                           ~channelID, 'High', DRRE
   )
   ]
  --[
  TerminalAccepts( <~PAN,
                    <'LocalAuth', 'NoCopyIAD'>, 'NoCVM',
                    <$amount, 'Switzerland', 'TVR', 'CHF',
                     'YYMMDD', 'Purchase', UN, CVMR, TRMD>,
                    ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, 'C8'>
  ),
  CheckRelayResistance( ~PAN, UN, DRRE ), OfflineAuth( ),
  Commit( 'Terminal', ~PAN,
          <'Card', 'Terminal', ~PAN,
           <'LocalAuth', 'NoCopyIAD'>, 'NoCVM',
           <$amount, 'Switzerland', 'TVR', 'CHF',
            'YYMMDD', 'Purchase', UN, CVMR, TRMD>,
           ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, 'C8'>
  ),
  Honest( $CA ), Honest( $Issuer ), Honest( $Terminal ),
  Honest( ~PAN )
  ]->
   [ ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Receives_CopyIAD_AC:
   [
   Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
         <
          <~PAN, <AIP_Data1, 'CopyIAD'>, CVM, X, ATC,
           MAC(f(~MK, ATC),
               <X, <AIP_Data1, 'CopyIAD'>, ATC, IAD_MAC>),
           <IAD, IAD_MAC>, AID>,
          encPIN>
   ),
   !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK ), !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer )
   ]
  --[ Once( <~PAN, ATC, 'Issuer'> ) ]->
   [
   Issuer_Checked_AC( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                      <~PAN, <AIP_Data1, 'CopyIAD'>, CVM, X, ATC,
                       MAC(f(~MK, ATC),
                           <X, <AIP_Data1, 'CopyIAD'>, ATC, IAD_MAC>),
                       <IAD, IAD_MAC>, AID>,
                      encPIN, channelID,
                      MAC_arpc(f(~MK, ATC),
                               (
                                MAC(f(~MK, ATC),
                                    <X, <AIP_Data1, 'CopyIAD'>, ATC, IAD_MAC>)⊕
                                p8('ARC')))
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Receives_NoCopyIAD_AC:
   [
   Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
         <
          <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC,
           MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), IAD, AID
          >,
          encPIN>
   ),
   !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK ), !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer )
   ]
  --[
  Once( <~PAN, ATC, 'Issuer'> ),
  NEq( snd(AIP), 'CopyIAD' )
  ]->
   [
   Issuer_Checked_AC( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                      <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC,
                       MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), IAD, AID
                      >,
                      encPIN, channelID,
                      MAC_arpc(f(~MK, ATC),
                               (MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>)⊕
                                p8('ARC')))
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /*
  rule (modulo AC) Issuer_Receives_NoCopyIAD_AC:
     [
     Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
           <
            <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC,
             MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), IAD, AID
            >,
            encPIN>
     ),
     !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK ), !IssuingIssuer( ~PAN, $Issuer )
     ]
    --[
    Once( <~PAN, ATC, 'Issuer'> ),
    NEq( z, 'CopyIAD' )
    ]->
     [
     Issuer_Checked_AC( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                        <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC,
                         MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), IAD, AID
                        >,
                        encPIN, channelID,
                        MAC_arpc(f(~MK, ATC),
                                 (MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>)⊕
                                  p8('ARC')))
     )
     ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. AIP = AIP.33
       z = snd(AIP.33)
    
    2. AIP = <x.853, z.439>
       z = z.439
    // loop breaker: [0]
  */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Receives_AC_CopyIAD_Failed:
   [
   Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
         <
          <~PAN, <futherData, 'CopyIAD'>, CVM, X, ATC, AC,
           <IAD, IAD_MAC>, AID>,
          encPIN>
   ),
   !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK )
   ]
  --[
  NEq( MAC(f(~MK, ATC),
           <X, <futherData, 'CopyIAD'>, ATC, IAD_MAC>),
       AC
  ),
  IssuerDeclines( <~PAN, <futherData, 'CopyIAD'>,
                   CVM, X, ATC, AC, <IAD, IAD_MAC>, AID>
  )
  ]->
   [ ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Receives_AC_NoCopyIAD_Failed:
   [
   Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
         <<~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD, AID>, encPIN>
   ),
   !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK )
   ]
  --[
  NEq( MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), AC ),
  IssuerDeclines( <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD, AID> ),
  NEq( snd(AIP), 'CopyIAD' )
  ]->
   [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) Issuer_Receives_AC_NoCopyIAD_Failed:
     [
     Recv( $Terminal, $Issuer, <channelID, '1'>,
           <<~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD, AID>, encPIN>
     ),
     !Shk( ~PAN, ~MK )
     ]
    --[
    NEq( MAC(f(~MK, ATC), <X, AIP, ATC, '0000'>), AC ),
    IssuerDeclines( <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD, AID> ),
    NEq( z, 'CopyIAD' )
    ]->
     [ ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. AIP = AIP.18
       z = snd(AIP.18)
    
    2. AIP = <x.27, z.22>
       z = z.22
  */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Processes_CVM_NotOnlinePIN:
   [
   Issuer_Checked_AC( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                      <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>,
                      'Null', channelID, ARPC
   )
   ]
  --[
  NEq( CVM, 'OnlinePIN' ),
  Running( $Issuer, $Terminal,
           <'Issuer', 'Terminal', ~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC,
            AC, IAD_terminal, AID>
  )
  ]->
   [
   Issuer_Commits( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                   <~PAN, AIP, CVM, X, ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>, channelID,
                   ARPC
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Processes_CVM_OnlinePIN:
   [
   Issuer_Checked_AC( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                      <~PAN, AIP, 'OnlinePIN', X, ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID
                      >,
                      aenc(PIN, pk(~privkIssuer)), channelID, ARPC
   ),
   !LtkIssuer( $Issuer, ~privkIssuer ), !PIN( ~PAN, PIN )
   ]
  --[
  Running( $Issuer, $Terminal,
           <'Issuer', 'Terminal', ~PAN, AIP,
            'OnlinePIN', X, ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>
  )
  ]->
   [
   Issuer_Commits( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                   <~PAN, AIP, 'OnlinePIN', X, ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID
                   >,
                   channelID, ARPC
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Commits:
   [
   Issuer_Commits( $Issuer, $Terminal,
                   <~PAN, <'LocalAuth', 'NoCopyIAD'>, CVM,
                    <amount, country, TVR, currency, date, type, UN, CVMR, TRMD
                    >,
                    ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>,
                   channelID, ARPC
   ),
   !Value( amount, 'High' ), !AID( ~PAN, 'C8' ),
   !IssuingCA( $Issuer, $CA )
   ]
  --[
  Commit( $Issuer, ~PAN,
          <'Card', 'Issuer', ~PAN,
           <'LocalAuth', 'NoCopyIAD'>, CVM,
           <amount, country, TVR, currency, date, type, UN, CVMR, TRMD
           >,
           ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>
  ),
  Commit( $Issuer, $Terminal,
          <'Terminal', 'Issuer', ~PAN,
           <'LocalAuth', 'NoCopyIAD'>, CVM,
           <amount, country, TVR, currency, date, type, UN, CVMR, TRMD
           >,
           ATC, AC, IAD_terminal, AID>
  ),
  Honest( $CA ), Honest( $Issuer ), Honest( $Terminal ),
  Honest( ~PAN )
  ]->
   [
   Send( $Issuer, $Terminal, <channelID, '2'>,
         <'ARC', ARPC>
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


Restrictions of the Set of Traces


restriction equal:
  "∀ a b #i. (Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (a = b)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ a b #i. (Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (a = b)"
  */

restriction not_equal:
  "∀ a #i. (NEq( a, a ) @ #i) ⇒ (⊥)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ a #i. (NEq( a, a ) @ #i) ⇒ (⊥)"
  */

restriction once:
  "∀ a #i #j.
         ((Once( a ) @ #i) ∧ (Once( a ) @ #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ a #i #j.
         ((Once( a ) @ #i) ∧ (Once( a ) @ #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
  */

restriction unique_role:
  "∀ A r1 r2 #i #j.
         ((Role( A, r1 ) @ #i) ∧ (Role( A, r2 ) @ #j)) ⇒ (r1 = r2)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ A r1 r2 #i #j.
         ((Role( A, r1 ) @ #i) ∧ (Role( A, r2 ) @ #j)) ⇒ (r1 = r2)"
  */

restriction valid_CVM:
  "∀ CVM #i.
         (ValidCVM( CVM ) @ #i) ⇒
         (((CVM = 'NoCVM') ∨ (CVM = 'OnlinePIN')) ∨
          (CVM = 'ODCVM'))"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ CVM #i.
         (ValidCVM( CVM ) @ #i) ⇒
         (((CVM = 'NoCVM') ∨ (CVM = 'OnlinePIN')) ∨
          (CVM = 'ODCVM'))"
  */

restriction supported_CVM:
  "∀ PAN #i #j.
         ((SupportedCVM( PAN, 'OnlinePIN' ) @ #i) ∧
          (SupportedCVM( PAN, 'ODCVM' ) @ #j)) ⇒
         (⊥)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ PAN #i #j.
         ((SupportedCVM( PAN, 'OnlinePIN' ) @ #i) ∧
          (SupportedCVM( PAN, 'ODCVM' ) @ #j)) ⇒
         (⊥)"
  */

restriction compatible_CVM:
  "∀ CVM1 CVM2 #i.
         (CompatibleCVM( CVM1, CVM2 ) @ #i) ⇒
         ((CVM1 = 'NoCVM') ∨ (CVM1 = CVM2))"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ CVM1 CVM2 #i.
         (CompatibleCVM( CVM1, CVM2 ) @ #i) ⇒
         ((CVM1 = 'NoCVM') ∨ (CVM1 = CVM2))"
  */
title: Multiset rewriting rules and restrictions
